programme.title: הקרקס של טורו (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה שובת לב. תרנגולת שאינה מסוגלת להטיל ביצים וניחנת במראה יוצא דופן, פוגשת בבעלת חווה קשישה, ומגלה כשרונות חבויים - להבין ולדבר עם בני אדם ולשיר בקול מרהיב. במאים: אדוארדו גונדל, ויקטור מוניוט. ספרד, 2019. כ' עב'.

programme.title: פנדה באפריקה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מרגשת. פנדה צעיר והרפתקן יוצא למסע מסין לאפריקה כדי להציל את חברתו הדרקונית שנעלמה. בדרך הוא מגלה עולם מוזר ומדהים בו נאלץ להתמודד עם היפופוטמים מפחידים, צבועים חשדניים וגורילות חכמות. דיבוב עב': אלונה אלכסנדר. 2024.

programme.title: הקופסונים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה המועמדת לאוסקר עבור סרט האנימציה הטוב ביותר. יתום שגדל עם חבורה יוצאת דופן של "אוספי אשפה" חייב להציל את חבריו ממדביר מרושע, בעזרת ילדה שפגש. דיבוב: פלג רנד, מיכאל הנגבי. בימוי: גרהאם אנאבל, אנתוני סטצ'י. 2014.

programme.title: המשפחה המכושפת שלי (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. לקראת יום הולדתה ה-13, מוזיקאית צעירה ומוכשרת רק רוצה להיות כמו שאר בני משפחתה הקסומה. אז מדוע אמה מתנגדת לזה? בעודה מנסה להבין את העניין, היא מגלה סודות מדהימים על משפחתה ועל זהותה הייחודית. דיבוב עב'. 2024. כ' עב'.

programme.title: שומרת הדרקונים (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. קיסר מרושע שכעת שולט בסין העתיקה, כולא את הדרקונים, שהיו בעבר חברים של בני האדם. ילדה צעירה ומלאת תושייה, עוזרת לדרקון האחרון שטרם נשבה לברוח, ויחד הם מנסים להציל את שאר הדרקונים. דיבוב עב': ניר ברק. 2024.

programme.title: ראמבל (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות לכל המשפחה. בעולם בו מפלצות ובני אדם חיים זה לצד זה, מאמצת לעצמה נערה צעירה מפלצת חביבה בשם סטיב במטרה להפוך אותו לאלוף אולימפי בהיאבקות המפלצות המסורתית. דיבוב עב'. במאי: האמיש גריב. 2021.

programme.title: קונג פו פנדה 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: קונג פו פנדה חוזר להרפתקה חדשה. הפעם פו מצטרף לקבוצה חדשה של לוחמי קונג-פו כדי לחסל אויב ותיק עם נשק קטלני, כשבמקביל עליו להתמודד עם סודות הקשורים למשפחתו. דיבוב: דביר בנדק, דידי הררי. 2011. כ' עב'.

programme.title: האגדה של אוצ'י (מדובב)
programme.desc: דרמת פנטזיה והרפתקאות מלאת דמיון. בכפר מבודד שבו יצורי ה"אוצ'י" שולטים בלילה, ילדה אמיצה מוצאת גור פצוע ויוצאת איתו למסע קסום להשיבו למשפחתו. עם: הלנה צנגל, וילם דפו, אמילי ווטסון. במאי: איזיאה סקסון. ארה"ב, 2025. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: בית ספר לחיות מדברות (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאות, המשך ללהיט 'סוד החיות הקסומות'. החיות המיוחדות שיודעות לדבר חוזרות, והפעם הן עוזרות לתלמידי ביה"ס להתגבר על הפחדים שלהם לקראת טקס סיום הלימודים, ועל הדרך לפתור תעלומה נוספת. דיבוב עב': בר מיניאלי, שילה שהם. 2022.

programme.title: האי של נים (מדובב)
programme.desc: משפחה. נים מושפעת מסדרת ספרים על אלכס רובר, ההרפתקן הגדול בעולם. כשאביה נעלם, הגורל מפגיש בינה לבין הסופרת ויחד הן יוצאות לחקור את ההיעלמות המסתורית. דיבוב: שירה נאור. במאית: ג'ניפר פלאקט, 2008. כ' עב'.

programme.title: חבורת המערב הפרוע (מדובב)
programme.desc: הרפתקאה מלאת אקשן, אומץ ורגש! שני אחים יוצאים להרפתקה מרהיבה ברחבי ארה"ב כדי למצוא את דודם. בדרך הם פוגשים חברים חדשים, נתקלים בשודדים ואינדיאנים, ומגלים עולמות מפתיעים. במאי: פדרו סוליס. ספרד, 2024. מדובב לעב'.

programme.title: קונג פו פנדה 2
programme.desc: קונג פו פנדה חוזר להרפתקה חדשה. פו מצטרף לקבוצה חדשה של לוחמי קונג-פו כדי לחסל אויב ותיק עם נשק קטלני, כשבמקביל עליו להתמודד עם סודות הקשורים למשפחתו. דיבוב: ג'ק בלאק, אנג'לינה ג'ולי. 2011.

programme.title: דגים נגד תרנגולות (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. יוליוס הוא כריש רעב שאוהב דגים- כחברים. חבריו חוששים מהיום שבו יהיה רעב באמת ועולים ליבשה כדי לתפוס עבורו תרנגולות. אך הם מגלים את בני האדם- שאוכלים דגים. דיבוב: דון לני-גבאי, תמיר ורדי. במאי: ג'ו-אן הו. 2011. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: תעלול של משלוח (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציית הרפתקאות. המשך ללהיט "תעלול של טיול". צמד החברים מהג'ונגל, הדוב מיק מיק ואוסקר הארנב יוצאים להרפתקה מסמרת שיער בכדור פורח, כדי לאתר את הוריו של גור דוב גריזלי קטן ונטוש. דיבוב עב': אמנון וולף, אור דגן. 2022.(n)

programme.title: נוקאאוט צ'יקן (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. תרנגול צעיר וביישן, שחולם להיות אלוף אגרוף בקרבות תרנגולים, צריך להפוך מחלשלוש ללוחם אמיץ ונועז כדי להגשים את חלומו. דיבוב עב': דניאל מגון, יורם יוספסברג. במאים: גבריאל ורודלפו ריבה-פלסיו אלטריסטה. 2015. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: פנדה באפריקה (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מרגשת. פנדה צעיר והרפתקן יוצא למסע מסין לאפריקה כדי להציל את חברתו הדרקונית שנעלמה. בדרך הוא מגלה עולם מוזר ומדהים בו נאלץ להתמודד עם היפופוטמים מפחידים, צבועים חשדניים וגורילות חכמות. דיבוב עב': אלונה אלכסנדר. 2024.(n)

programme.title: 200% זאב (מדובב)
programme.desc: פרדי הפודל הגיבור חוזר בענק, והפעם נותן 200% מעצמו! הפעם מנסה פרדי להוביל את להקת אנשי הזאב, אך לא מצליח לזכות בכבוד של חבריו. האם הוא יצליח להוכיח לעצמו ולכל השאר שהוא 200% זאב? דיבוב: יובל חופי, נירית מיליס. 2024. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: קונג פו פנדה 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: קונג פו פנדה חוזר להרפתקה חדשה. הפעם פו מצטרף לקבוצה חדשה של לוחמי קונג-פו כדי לחסל אויב ותיק עם נשק קטלני, כשבמקביל עליו להתמודד עם סודות הקשורים למשפחתו. דיבוב: דביר בנדק, דידי הררי. 2011. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: נורם בעיר הגדולה 2 (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה. דב הקוטב המדבר חוזר בהרפתקה חדשה! והפעם נורם מגיע לניו יורק והופך מגיבור למבוקש. במקביל עליו להציל את הקוטב מפני חברה המתכננת להפוך את הקרח לבקבוקי מים מינרליים. דיבוב: אורי זלצמן. במאי: טים מלטבי. 2018. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.title: סוניק הסרט 3 (מדובב)
programme.desc: סוניק הקיפוד האהוב והמהיר בעולם חוזר להרפתקה מרהיבה חדשה! סוניק, נאקלס וטיילס מתאחדים נגד יריב חדש ועוצמתי בשם שאדו, בעל כוחות חדשים ומיסתוריים שלא נראו כמותם עד כה. עם: ג'ים קארי. דיבוב לעב': לירון לב. במאי: ג'ף פאולר. 2024.(n)

programme.title: צעצוע של חיות (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מקסימה. נתן הוא אחד מדמויות פורצלן קטנות שמשנות צבעים במגע עם מים חמים. אבל רק הצבע שלו לא משתנה. יום אחד, נתן פוגש רובוט קטן ומצטרף אליו להרפתקה כדי לשחזר את יכולתו האבודה. במאי: גארי וונג. דיבוב עב'. סין, 2017.(n)

programme.title: קובו: אגדה של סמוראי (מדובב)
programme.desc: אנימציה מרהיבה המועמדת לפרס האוסקר לסרט האנימציה הטוב ביותר. על מנת שיצליח להביס רוח נקמנית מהעבר, יוצא קובו למסע בעקבות חליפת שריון קסומה שהיתה של אביו הסמוראי. דיבוב עב': אסף גשמקו. במאי: טראביס נייט. 2016. כ' עב'.(n)

programme.desc: הרפתקאה מלאת אקשן, אומץ ורגש! שני אחים יוצאים להרפתקה מרהיבה ברחבי ארה"ב כדי למצוא את דודם. בדרך הם פוגשים חברים חדשים, נתקלים בשודדים ואינדיאנים, ומגלים עולמות מפתיעים. במאי: פדרו סוליס. ספרד, 2024. מדובב לעב'.(n)

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade
The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.(n)

programme.title: The Friend
programme.desc: When a solitary writer adopts and bonds with a Great Dane that belonged to a late friend, she begins to come to terms with her past and her own creative inner life. Drama based on the novel by Sigrid Nunez, starring Naomi Watts and Bill Murray.(n)

programme.title: The Blind Side
programme.desc: A middle-class family take in a hulking homeless teenager, who has no education or skills to speak of. The indomitable wife encourages him to turn his life around, helping him to get the grades he needs for a college scholarship and hone his sporting skills to become an American football player. Fact-based drama, starring an Oscar-winning Sandra Bullock alongside Quinton Aaron and Tim McGraw.(n)

programme.title: Little Women
programme.desc: Four sisters are raised by their strong-willed mother while their father is away fighting in the American Civil War. Although one yearns to become a writer and another dreams of being married, the girls remain firmly united as the family steers a course through hard times and tragic events. Period drama, based on Louisa May Alcott's novel, with Winona Ryder, Susan Sarandon, Claire Danes, Samantha Mathis and Kirsten Dunst.(n)

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.(n)

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.(n)

programme.title: The Damned United
programme.desc: Fact-based drama chronicling Brian Clough's ill-fated 44-day tenure as boss of Leeds United in 1974, after Don Revie's departure for the job of England's manager. Following his acrimonious split from Derby County and a brief spell at Brighton \u0026 Hove Albion, Clough arrived at Elland Road on a wave of controversy, after previously being an outspoken critic of the club, and struggled to find allies among the playing staff. With Michael Sheen, Timothy Spall, Jim Broadbent and Colm Meaney.(n)

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.(n)

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: Rachel Marron, a famous singer and actress is subjected to death threats by an obsessive fan and persuaded to hire a former secret service agent as her bodyguard. However, neither she or her new minder realise the effect they are about to have on each other's lives. Romantic thriller directed by Mick Jackson, starring Kevin Costner, Whitney Houston, Gary Kemp and Bill Cobbs.(n)

programme.title: American Sniper
programme.desc: A Navy Seal becomes a legend to his colleagues thanks to his skills as a deadly sniper. On his return to the US following four tours of duty in Iraq, he finds living an ordinary life as a husband and father far more difficult to deal with than the demands of warfare. Biopic based on the experiences of real-life Iraq conflict veteran Chris Kyle, directed by Clint Eastwood and starring Bradley Cooper, Sienna Miller and Kyle Gallner.(n)

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.(n)

programme.title: Darkest Hour
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britain's European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas.(n)

programme.title: Terms of Endearment
programme.desc: A woman supports her daughter despite their differences over three tumultuous decades. The indomitable matriarch disapproves of her daughter's marriage and finds grandmotherhood hard to get used to, but is fiercely protective of her family when tragedy strikes. Oscar-winning drama, starring Shirley MacLaine, Debra Winger, Jack Nicholson, Danny DeVito and Jeff Daniels.(n)

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso.(n)

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.(n)

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.(n)

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.(n)

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: In 1971, an American military analyst uncovers the depths of the US government's deceptions about the futility of the Vietnam War, and takes action by copying top-secret documents that would become the Pentagon Papers. Washington Post owner Kay Graham and her editor Ben Bradlee discover The New York Times is preparing an explosive expose on those papers and, determined to compete, set out to publish them first. Steven Spielberg's fact-based drama, starring Meryl Streep, Tom Hanks, Sarah Paulson and Bob Odenkirk.(n)

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: An idealistic sports agent produces a mission statement at work promising to treat clients fairly. Unfortunately, it costs him his job. Forced to set up an agency on his own, the only people prepared to stand by him are a lovelorn staff accountant and a footballer. Cameron Crowe's romantic comedy drama, with Tom Cruise, Renee Zellweger, Kelly Preston, Jonathan Lipnicki, and Cuba Gooding Jr, who won an Oscar for his performance.(n)

programme.title: Do the Right Thing
programme.desc: Racial tensions erupt in a Brooklyn neighbourhood on the hottest day of the summer. The simmering conflicts centre on the Italian-owned local pizza parlour, as a minor dispute gradually escalates into full-blown violence. Drama, directed by and starring Spike Lee, with Danny Aiello, John Turturro, Ossie Davis, Rosie Perez and Samuel L Jackson.(n)

programme.title: Anora
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Baker's Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Risky Romance
programme.desc: From killers and zombies to forbidden love and dangerous desires, The Cinema List explores romances where passion courts danger and love is always worth the risk.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.

programme.title: Nuremberg
programme.desc: A US Army psychiatrist is sent to assess high-ranking Nazi prisoners - most notably Hermann Göring - to decide if they're fit for trial. As the Nuremberg trials begin, he becomes enmeshed in a psychological and legal battle. Director James Vanderbilt's thriller, starring Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Leo Woodall.

The simmering conflicts centre on the Italian-owned local pizza parlour, as a minor dispute gradually escalates into full-blown violence. Drama, directed by and starring Spike Lee, with Danny Aiello, John Turturro, Ossie Davis, Rosie Perez and Samuel L Jackson.

programme.title: Peggy Sue Got Married
programme.desc: A depressed fortysomething woman about to get divorced faints at a high-school reunion and awakes to find she has travelled back in time to her teenage years. Given the chance to put things right, she resolves to avoid a relationship with the man she is about to divorce. Comedy, starring Kathleen Turner, Nicolas Cage, Maureen O'Sullivan, Joan Allen, Catherine Hicks and Kevin J O'Connor.

programme.title: About a Boy
programme.desc: An idle womaniser pretends to be a father to meet women in a single mothers' group - but he starts to change his selfish ways when a lonely youngster with a depressed mum becomes emotionally attached to him. Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornby's novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz.

programme.title: It Ends With Us
programme.desc: Lily Bloom returns to her childhood home of Plethora, Maine, to attend the funeral of her father, the former town mayor who beat his wife behind closed doors. Upon returning to Boston, Lily is attracted to Ryle Kincaid, a neurosurgeon with a dark side, and old flame Atlas Corrigan. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.

programme.title: Lost in Translation
programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.

programme.title: Molly's Game
programme.desc: Fact-based drama about Molly Bloom, an Olympic-class skier who ran the world's most exclusive high-stakes poker game for a decade before being arrested in the middle of the night by FBI agents wielding automatic weapons. Her players included Hollywood royalty, sports stars, business titans and finally - unbeknownst to her - the Russian Mob. Directed by The West Wing creator Aaron Sorkin, and starring Jessica Chastain, Idris Elba and Kevin Costner.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Romantic comedy drama, with Ashton Kutcher, Jessica Alba, Jamie Foxx, Jennifer Garner and Julia Roberts.

programme.desc: A lonely and past-his-prime American actor travels to Japan to film a commercial. During a depressing night in the hotel bar, he meets a spirited younger woman and the pair strike up a close friendship, exploring Tokyo and helping each other face the mundanities of everyday life. Sofia Coppola's comedy drama, starring Bill Murray, Scarlett Johansson and Giovanni Ribisi.

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: Riley, a young woman recently released from rehab, meets Ethan and finds herself navigating the line between love and a new addiction. Director Brittany Snow's romantic comedy drama, starring Courtney Eaton, Thomas Mann and Dave Bautista.

programme.title: I Used to Be Funny
programme.desc: A stand-up comedian struggling with PTSD agonises over whether or not to join the search for a missing teenage girl she used to look after. Writer-director Ally Pankiw's comedy drama, starring Rachel Sennott and Olga Petsa.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.

programme.title: Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Anthology of stories charting the romantic complications of various Los Angeles residents. A businessman and a soldier on leave share a flight home, a teacher is smitten with a doctor and an elderly couple comfort their lovesick grandson. Drama based on the bestselling novel, starring Blake Lively, Justin Baldoni, Jenny Slate and Brandon Sklenar.

Romantic comedy adapted from Nick Hornby's novel, starring Hugh Grant, Toni Collette, Nicholas Hoult and Rachel Weisz.

programme.title: Parachute
programme.desc: Riley, a young woman recently released from rehab, meets Ethan and finds herself navigating the line between love and a new addiction. Director Brittany Snow's romantic comedy drama, starring Courtney Eaton, Thomas Mann and Dave Bautista.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.

programme.title: The Boy in the Striped Pyjamas
programme.desc: Bruno, a boy in Nazi Germany, moves to the country when his father is placed in charge of a concentration camp. While exploring the woods close to the facility's boundary, he spots a Jewish youngster being held there, and the two become friends - but Bruno remains innocently oblivious to the camp's true purpose. Drama, starring David Thewlis, Asa Butterfield and Jack Scanlon.

programme.title: Two Mules for Sister Sara
programme.desc: A grizzled drifter rescues a nun from a gang of rapists and gets roped into escorting her across the Mexican desert. He gradually realises there is more to his new companion than meets the eye - and she may be hiding a surprising secret. Don Siegel's Western, starring Clint Eastwood, Shirley MacLaine, Manolo Fabregas, Alberto Morin and John Kelly.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Two students at Harvard University fall in love, but their romance is fated to be cut tragically short by the discovery that one of them has a terminal illness. Romantic drama, starring Ali MacGraw, Ryan O'Neal and Ray Milland.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.

programme.title: Turtles All the Way Down
programme.desc: A teenager strives to be a good daughter, a good friend and a good student - all while navigating an endless barrage of invasive, obsessive thoughts that she cannot control. When she reconnects with her childhood crush, she is confronted with fundamental questions about her potential for love, happiness, friendship and hope - all while trying to solve a mystery surrounding a fugitive billionaire. Romantic drama, starring Isabela Merced, Cree and Judy Reyes.

programme.title: Coach Carter
programme.desc: A former professional basketball player agrees to coach a high-school team, but he is unimpressed by its lack of discipline and instigates a tough new regimen. All goes well until the youngsters start to become complacent, forcing him to take drastic action - which leads to a backlash of complaints from angry parents and pupils alike. Drama, with Samuel L Jackson, Ashanti, Rob Brown and Robert Ri'chard.

programme.title: I, Tonya
programme.desc: Ice skater Tonya Harding rises through the ranks at the US figure skating championships, but her future in the sport is thrown into question by a shocking incident after her ex-husband steps in. Director Craig Gillespie's comedy biopic, starring Margot Robbie, Sebastian Stan, and Allison Janney, who won a Bafta and an Oscar for her performance.

programme.title: Escape to Victory
programme.desc: Allied PoWs take to the football field when a group of Nazi officers comes up with the idea to have them take on a German team for a propaganda event. However, the prisoners see a chance to escape during the match. Second World War adventure, with Michael Caine, Sylvester Stallone, Max von Sydow and Daniel Massey. Soccer legends also making appearances include Pele, Bobby Moore and Ossie Ardiles.

programme.title: The Cut
programme.desc: A retired boxer returns to the ring for one last shot at the title, but must embark on an illegal weight cut programme first. Sports thriller, starring Orlando Bloom, Caitriona Balfe and John Turturro.

programme.title: No Escape
programme.desc: An American takes a job in an Asian nation and relocates his family overseas. However, no sooner do they arrive then a revolution takes the country by storm. They face a struggle for survival as the new government seeks to eliminate all foreigners. Action thriller, starring Owen Wilson, Pierce Brosnan and Lake Bell.

programme.title: A Star Is Born
programme.desc: Following a gig, fading music star Jackson Maine happens upon Ally, a nightclub singer-songwriter. Their instant chemistry leads to a tempestuous romance as he helps her on the road to stardom. However, Jackson's alcoholism has explosive repercussions as her career blossoms. Oscar-winning drama, starring Lady Gaga, Bradley Cooper, who also directed, and Sam Elliott.

programme.title: Joker: Folie a Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck meets the love of his life, Harleen 'Lee' Quinzel, while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Musical thriller, starring Joaquin Phoenix, Lady Gaga and Brendan Gleeson.

programme.title: The Gentleman
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman.(n)

programme.title: Pets on a Train
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, they're swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu.(n)

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a client's wedding, Lucy meets the groom's brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Song's romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal.(n)

programme.title: Icefall
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover he's aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene.(n)

programme.title: Bone Lake
programme.desc: A couple's holiday is upended when they're forced to share a mansion with a mysterious couple, spiralling into a maze of sex, lies and manipulation. Comedy thriller, starring Alex Roe and Maddie Hasson.(n)

programme.title: Bring Her Back
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Laura's home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins.(n)

programme.title: King Ivory
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the city's criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster.(n)

programme.title: Storms of the Century
programme.desc: Looking back at some of the worst hurricanes starting with a storm that changed New Orleans, and the country, forever - Hurricane Katrina; hosted by Al Roker.","large":"Since the turn of the millennium, we're seeing deadly and destructive hurricanes slam into the U-S, leaving an unimaginable toll. "Once-in-a-century" storms are now becoming recurring events. Over the next 30 minutes, we are looking back at some of the worst hurricanes starting with a storm that changed New Orleans, and the country, forever - Hurricane Katrina. Hosted by Al Roker.(n)

programme.desc: Against all odds, a young woman is found alive after an attack on her and a friend near Corpus Christi, Texas.(n)

programme.desc: A woman's story about an abduction and murder helps reopen a decades-old case that has weighed heavy on a New York town.(n)

Promising Young Woman
programme.desc: In this Oscar and BAFTA-winning thriller with Carey Mulligan, a woman pursues her own form of justice after her friend is sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Cool Hand Luke
programme.desc: Paul Newman is unforgettable as the defiant Deep South chain-gang prisoner whose rebellion makes him a hero with fellow inmates. An Oscar-winning George Kennedy co-stars.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes: A Game Of Shadows
programme.desc: Robert Downey Jr and Jude Law return as the shrewd detective and his trusty aide Watson, taking on arch-nemesis Moriarty in a battle of wits. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Children Of Men
programme.desc: In 2027, humanity faces extinction thanks to worldwide infertility. Can Clive Owen keep a miraculously pregnant woman alive? Sci-fi with Julianne Moore. Strong language.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Michael Keaton's Bruce Wayne takes on Jack Nicholson's villainous Joker. Gothic Gotham fantasy directed by Tim Burton. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: The life and work of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart seen through the eyes of his contemporary and rival, Antonio Salieri.

programme.desc: In 2027, humanity faces extinction thanks to worldwide infertility. Can Clive Owen keep a miraculously pregnant woman alive? Sci-fi with Julianne Moore. Strong language.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: When disaster hits, astronauts Sandra Bullock and George Clooney are left fighting for survival in space. Stunning winner of seven Oscars.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Christopher Nolan's awe-inspiring sci-fi epic stars Matthew McConaughey and Anne Hathaway as explorers tasked with securing humanity's survival.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio is a master of sub-conscious espionage in Christopher Nolan's blockbuster. Sci-fi thriller. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange
programme.desc: Stanley Kubrick's controversial classic about an off-the-wall gang who embark on a violent crime spree. Malcolm McDowell stars. Violence/mature themes.

programme.title: An Officer And A Gentleman
programme.desc: Classic romantic drama starring Richard Gere as a troubled trainee naval officer who falls for Debra Winger's sassy factory girl. Strong language/moderate sex and nudity.

programme.title: Gravity
programme.desc: When disaster hits, astronauts Sandra Bullock and George Clooney are left fighting for survival in space. Stunning winner of seven Oscars.

programme.title: Interstellar
programme.desc: Christopher Nolan's awe-inspiring sci-fi epic stars Matthew McConaughey and Anne Hathaway as explorers tasked with securing humanity's survival.

programme.title: Inception
programme.desc: Leonardo DiCaprio is a master of sub-conscious espionage in Christopher Nolan's blockbuster. Sci-fi thriller. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: E.T. The Extra-Terrestrial
programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's hugely successful sci-fi drama about a young boy who makes friends with a stranded alien. With Drew Barrymore and Henry Thomas. Contains flashing images.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: Police chief Roy Scheider hunts the killer shark menacing his peaceful seaside community. Spielberg's classic thriller. Language/violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth
programme.desc: An extraction team race to an island research facility to obtain DNA for a life-saving drug.

programme.title: Lord Of The Rings: Fellowship Of The Ring
programme.desc: Frodo Baggins and his companions begin their quest to defeat evil. A breathtaking start to the trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: The Lord Of The Rings: Two Towers
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam meet Gollum on their quest, while good and evil battle at Helm's Deep. Second instalment in the trilogy. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Blade
programme.desc: A half-vampire possesses all the strengths inherent in bloodsuckers with none of their weaknesses, and is determined to wipe the monsters from the face of the Earth. However, he faces a deadly new threat in a renegade vampire who is close to decoding an ancient prophecy that will allow him to repopulate the world with his kind. Action thriller, starring Wesley Snipes, Stephen Dorff and Kris Kristo

programme.title: Fast & Furious 5
programme.desc: Criminal Dominic Toretto is broken out of prison by his partners in crime and together they flee to South America. They begin assembling a gang of crooks to carry out a heist in Rio, but the FBI's top manhunter is in the country and hot on their trail. Action adventure sequel, starring Vin Diesel, Dwayne Johnson, Paul Walker and Jordana Brewster.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-March 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: The Mechanic
programme.desc: A professional hitman lets his emotional detachment slip when his mentor is murdered, and puts his deadly skills to the task of getting revenge. The solitary assassin finds an ally in his teacher's son, who also yearns for vengeance and persuades the killer to teach him the tricks of the trade. Action thriller remake, starring Jason Statham, Ben Foster and Donald Sutherland.

programme.title: Rampage
programme.desc: When three different animals become infected with a dangerous pathogen, a primatologist and a geneticist team up to stop them from destroying Chicago. Fantasy adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Naomie Harris and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop delves into the murky world of international arms theft to track down a missing nuclear warhead - but the bad guys try to get him out of the way by framing him for murder. Martial arts adventure, starring Jackie Chan, Jackson Lou, Annie Wu, Bill Tung and Jouri Petrov. In Mandarin, Cantonese, English, Russian and Ukrainian.

programme.title: Street Fighter
programme.desc: A military officer goes in search of a power-mad general who is holding several hostages in a secret location. He soon finds he is not the only one on the maniac's trail, and joins forced with a mismatched band of martial artists to save the captives. Action adventure based on the video game, starring Jean-Claude Van Damme, Raul Julia, Kylie Minogue and Ming-Na Wen.

programme.title: Mad Max
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Miller's action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne.

programme.title: Demolition Man
programme.desc: Maverick cop John Spartan is frozen alive in 1996 and held in cryonic suspension for a crime he did not commit. Decades into the future, the dictator of a seemingly utopian city unleashes a criminal psychopath against his political enemy - but he proves impossible to control, forcing the authorities to revive Spartan to defeat him. Sci-fi thriller, with Sylvester Stallone, Wesley Snipes, Sandra Bu

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: Fuelled by his restored faith in humanity and inspired by Superman's selfless act, Bruce Wayne enlists the help of newfound ally Diana Prince to face an even greater enemy. programme.title: The Beekeeper
programme.desc: An apparently unassuming man finds someone very important to him has been scammed and driven to harm. Revealed as a former operative of a powerful and clandestine organisation known as 'Beekeepers', he sets out on a brutal quest of vengeance, hunting those responsible for the incident, who have seriously underestimated how much of a threat he is. Action thriller, starring Jason Statham, Jeremy Iro

programme.title: Vendetta
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution. After killing the street thug who was directly responsible for her death, he finds himself in the middle of a war with the dead man's brother, who is equally hell-bent on getting even. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis and Thomas Jan

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: A battle-hardened special forces operative attempts to rescue his kidnapped niece when a mercenary mission spirals into chaos. Action thriller, starring Eden Brolin, Andy Garcia and Melissa Leo.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview-March 2026
programme.desc: Previews of the films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berko

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleague's murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
programme.desc: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. programme.title: Chris Fleming: Live at the Palace
programme.desc: Comedian Chris Fleming bursts onto the screen with a fun and lighthearted blend of skillful storytelling and wild physicality in his first HBO stand-up special. A high-energy performer who seamlessly pivots from one everyday topic to another - from Trader Joe's to Oreos, NPR, and dog breeds - Fleming bounds across the stage as he shares his unique takes on masculinity, conga lines, and more.

programme.desc: Nikki Glaser dives into a wide range of topics including why she doesn't want kids, the harsh realities of aging, her sexual fantasies, and plans for her own death all in her hilarious, unapologetic, and brutally honest style.

programme.desc: Nikki Glaser takes on a range of topics in her brutally honest yet conversational style, including dishing about sex, outlining the dos and don'ts of dating, how to trick someone into marriage and oversharing about her not-so-private parts.

programme.desc: "Spider-Man" centers on student Peter Parker (Tobey Maguire) who, after being bitten by a genetically-altered spider, gains superhuman strength and the spider-like ability to cling to any surface. programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: Superman
